body: PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk (GGRP) shares plummeted 67.3% to IDR 212 on Friday, down from IDR 645 on Thursday, due to a change in nominal share value from IDR 500 to IDR 140, following shareholders' approval of a capital reduction. The decision led to the stock hitting its lower price limit, resulting in an automatic suspension, with controlling shareholders holding 76.41% and non-controlling shareholders owning 23.58% of the company.
title: Gunung Raja Paksi's shares plummet 67.3% after capital reduction and nominal value adjustment.

body: PT Golden Eagle Energy Tbk (SMMT) will issue 315 million shares at IDR 125 each through a private placement, raising IDR 393.75 billion to fund business expansion and working capital, with proceeds split 50:50. The company's assets are expected to increase by IDR 1.18 trillion from IDR 1.14 trillion, while total equity will rise to IDR 839.18 billion from IDR 878.55 billion.
title: PT Golden Eagle Energy to Raise Capital via Private Placement of 315 Million Shares

body: Wukong Technology Partners Limited (no ticker) acquires 49% of PT Remala Abadi TBK's issued and paid-up capital, totaling 50,000 shares, through a debt-to-equity swap, making it a new shareholder. The transaction results in a changed shareholder structure, with Data holding 51% and Wukong Technology holding 49%, and an increased authorized capital of IDR 50 billion from IDR 6.2 billion.
title: Wukong Technology becomes new shareholder of PT Remala Abadi TBK after acquiring 49% of issued paid-up capital through debt-to-equity swap.

body: PT Samudera Indonesia Tbk (SMDR) has seen a slowdown in its financial performance in the first nine months of 2024, but its stock has received a positive response from foreign investors, with a net buy of 11.15 million shares since November 1, 2024. The company's stock has increased by 0.71% to IDR 284 per share, with a total transaction value of IDR 86.89 billion, and has announced a capital expenditure allocation of USD 120 million to acquire 12 new vessels by the end of the year.
title: PT Samudera Indonesia's stock sees strong foreign investor interest despite slowing financial performance.
